subject: fix(types): resolve all pre-existing TypeScript errors
body:
- useRef calls: added explicit `undefined` initial value for timer refs
  in InstallPrompt, BurgerMenu, DebugPill, usePWAUpdate (React 19 types
  require initial argument for non-nullable refs)
- station/[id].tsx: cast Supabase join result to unknown[] before runtime
  validation — Supabase TS infers fuel_types as array from join syntax
  but returns a single object at runtime. The cast lets the type predicate
  work without fighting the inferred generic.

Result: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with zero errors.

Tags: typescript, types, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch
